The smoky essence of bacon intertwines flawlessly
with the gentle texture of eggs, creating a sublime harmony of flavors.
Eating it will increase Attack by +10% for a period of time.

Mild roast filled with the natural aromas of
herbs and berries embedded in the meat.
Gives a pleasant sense of warmth when eaten outdoors.

items.description:
Boar grilled over a hearty flame.
Crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside.
Perfect as an extravagant main dish for a big party.

Chicken skewer slow-grilled over a charcoal fire.
Light and refreshing on the tongue.

Elegant taste for an elegant lifestyle.

This allows it to retain freshness for long periods of time,
making it a perfect emergency ration.

Plump and juicy.

Perfect for tired Pal Tamers.

items.name: Primitive Sword
items.description: A sword for when you need to get up close and personal. Wickedly sharp. If your opponents doubt how keen the edge is, they only need to take a few steps forward.

items.name: Cake
items.description:
A dish that is eaten during celebrations.
Put it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to have a Pal lay a particularly healthy egg.

items.name: Mushroom Cake
items.description: When this dish is placed in a Breeding Farm chest, the Pal that consumes it will lay a particularly healthy egg. The Pal born from that egg will have stats that improve slightly faster than normal.

items.name: Vegetable Cake
items.description: When this dish is placed in a Breeding Farm chest, the Pal that consumes it will lay two particularly healthy eggs at the same time, instead of one.

items.name: Extravagant Vegetable Cake
items.description: When this dish is placed in a Breeding Farm chest, the Pal that consumes it will lay a particularly healthy egg. The Pal born from that egg will be more prone to mutations and have stats that improve faster than normal.

items.name: Special Cake
items.description: When this dish is placed in a Breeding Farm chest, the Pal that consumes it will lay a particularly healthy egg. The Pal born from that egg will be an improvement on its parents, inheriting their best traits.

items.name: Carbon Fiber

items.name: Carbonara
